title: Image To Image Clean Blue Tech Brand Male
sourceTitle: Image To Image Clean Blue Tech Brand Male Portrait AI Prompt

imagePrompts.prompt: Theme: Image-to-image modern tech-brand portrait using uploaded seated man reference before clean blue tech-brand portrait refinement, preserving same man from the uploaded reference with strict identity preservation. Subject: same man from the uploaded reference with strict identity preservation keeps strict identity from the uploaded reference while wearing Ultra-realistic portrait of the same man (strict identity preservation). and holding standing in the crosswalk with calm eye contact, relaxed shoulders, and confident night-street presence. Scene: rainy city crosswalk at night with wet reflective pavement, neon-lit buildings, passing-car light streaks, and soft bokeh creates a clean minimal tech-brand environment with cool blue, white, and soft neutral accents. Composition: Fixed 4:5 centered eye-level portrait with slight forward engagement, seated posture, elbows lightly on knees, relaxed confident body language, and clean negative space. Signature Elements: Preserved image to image clean blue tech brand male portrait source structure, fixed composition hierarchy, stable visual rhythm, and reusable content controls remain consistent across generated variants. Style: Ultra-realistic modern tech brand aesthetic, clean minimal portrait, fresh sharp composed mood, realistic textures, 8K sharpness, and noise-free commercial finish. Color Palette: Fixed cool blue, white, pastel blue, and soft neutral accents; Lighting: Clean focused visual treatment with coherent detail and source-consistent structure. Camera: 50mm lens, f/4, eye-level camera, natural perspective, centered framing, and crisp texture detail. Restrictions: Clean focused visual treatment with coherent detail and source-consistent structure.

promptTranslations.zh:
使用以下英文图像生成提示词；保留可见文字、品牌名、变量值和参数为英文。
